function.name: final_result
function.arguments: {"is_legal":true,"action_type":"deception","summary":"Talia's merchant tale convinces the goblins to stand down.","reasoning_summary":"Expertise and advantage apply.","roll_requests":[{"owner":"player","visibility":"public","expression":"2d20k1+5","purpose":"Deception check"}],"state_effects":[{"effect_type":"append_public_event","target":"encounter:goblin-camp-rogue","value":"The goblins are taken in by the merchant story."},{"effect_type":"set_phase","target":"encounter:goblin-camp-rogue","value":"encounter_complete"},{"effect_type":"set_encounter_outcome","target":"encounter:goblin-camp-rogue","value":"de-escalated"}],"rule_references":[]}
